summary: Iteration 14 pre-deploy regression: new Phase 2 pricing ($49.99 OI · $99.99 Full, 20% yearly = $479.90 OI / $2,879.71 Full · Enterprise contact-us), expanded tier gating (Disk Storage + AI chat now Full-only for OI/free), and React Router v7 future-flag silencing. Backend: 19/19 new pytest cases pass in test_iter14_pricing_gating.py PLUS all 23/23 prior cases still pass in test_phase2_billing.py + test_iter13_regression.py (total 42/42 = 100%). Frontend: /pricing renders all 3 plan cards with correct prices/seat badges/callouts on both monthly + yearly views; 'Save 20%' visible; OI 'Not included' contains all 5 lines; Enterprise features + tagline correct; Recommended ribbon on Full. As QA (free tier): sidebar shows lock icons on Federal Proposals, Investment Deals, Accelerator Applications, AND Disk Storage (nav-disk-lock); /disk-storage renders <RequireTier> tier-gate with 'Upgrade to Full Capture'; /profile shows all 7 FilesPanel components in locked state ('Disk storage is part of the Full Capture plan') with no upload buttons; AIChatButton is NOT rendered on opportunity detail. No React Router v7_startTransition / v7_relativeSplatPath warnings anywhere in the /home→/pricing→/login→authed flow. Stripe catalog verified via stripe.Price.list: oi_monthly=4999, full_monthly=9999, oi_yearly=47990, full_yearly=287971 with correct seat_limit metadata (1/1/1/3). Ready for production deploy.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor testid convention: review request expected the locked FilesPanel testid to be exactly 'files-panel-locked', but the actual pattern is '{testid}-locked' where {testid} is the caller-provided prop. On /profile the caller passes testid=`org-files-${key}`, so the resulting locked testids are 'org-files-past_performance-locked', 'org-files-commercialization-locked', 'org-files-capability_statements-locked', 'org-files-quad_charts-locked', 'org-files-resumes-locked', 'org-files-letters_of_support-locked', 'org-files-pitch_decks-locked'. Functionality is 100% correct (all 7 show the exact 'Disk storage is part of the Full Capture plan. Upgrade to unlock' copy with no upload button) — only the specific data-testid string differs. Consider aligning docs/spec, or add a stable `data-testid="files-panel-locked"` in addition to the per-panel one if downstream Playwright tests expect the generic id.

billing.py assert_full_tier is now guarding files upload/list/download/delete AND ai_chat — nice consistency. Note: gather_org_file_context() (used by AI prompt builders) is NOT gated because it's an internal helper, only reachable through already-gated write endpoints. Confirmed no accidental leakage: proposal/venture drafting endpoints are gated at the router layer, and ai_chat is now also gated. Solid layering.

setup_stripe.py: idempotent price migration correctly archives drifted prices (active=False, lookup_key=None) before creating the new one with transfer_lookup_key=True. Verified via Stripe API — the 4 lookup keys resolve to unit_amount 4999/9999/47990/287971 with seat_limit metadata 1/1/1/3.
AIChatButton returns null early when !isFull, so nothing renders in the DOM (verified: 0 nodes with data-testid=ai-chat-open on the free-tier opportunity detail page). Good defensive placement.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter14_pricing_gating.py (new — 19 pytest cases covering new checkout lookup_keys, direct Stripe price verification, files+ai_chat tier gating for free tier, and all regression sanity checks)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 6 acceptance-criteria flows pass on preview URL)

seed_data_creation: 1 REGRESSION14_ refund_requests row was created during test_refund_request_still_200 to prove the write_audit(None,...) fix still holds. The module-scoped teardown fixture in test_iter14_pricing_gating.py automatically denies any pending REGRESSION14_ rows for QA at exit. Also 4 short-lived Stripe checkout sessions were created via api/payments/checkout (they auto-expire in 24h and were never followed to completion). No real subscriptions or refunds were created against Stripe. No investor_scan venture_docs were left behind (created & deleted immediately in phase2 tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: This was the final pre-deploy regression checkpoint for Phase 2. All acceptance criteria in the iter14 review request are green. Three regression files cover everything: test_iter14_pricing_gating.py (19), test_phase2_billing.py (17), test_iter13_regression.py (6). QA account, org, and Supabase keys unchanged. Preview URL: https://govcon-workspace.preview.emergentagent.com. Before deploying to prod, flip frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL back to https://captureagent.us (currently pointed at preview) and restart frontend. Stripe is in test mode (STRIPE_MODE=test); the sandbox catalog matches the new $49.99/$99.99 + 20%-off-yearly + 3-seat-bundle model. Do NOT run stripe.Refund.create — QA has no real payment_intent.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — all requested features verified working. The single minor discrepancy (data-testid pattern for locked FilesPanel) is documented above under critical_code_review_comments; it is not a functional bug.
